THIS LOCAL STORM REPORT CONTAINS A FLASH FLOODING SUMMARY FOR FREESTONE COUNTY FROM 10/30 TO 10/31: ACROSS FREESTONE COUNTY... THERE ARE 12 ROADS WITH SECTIONS WASHED OUT BY FLASH FLOODING. SECTIONS OF ROADS THAT WERE WASHED OUT WERE MOSTLY BRIDGES OR CULVERTS. IN TEAGUE... 6 HOUSES WERE HEAVILY DAMAGED BY FLOODING. DURING THE EVENT... 4 PEOPLE NEEDED TO BE RESCUED/EVACUATED FROM THEIR HOMES DUE TO RAPIDLY RISING FLASH FLOOD WATERS. POWER AND FRESH WATER SERVICES WERE BEING RESTORED THROUGHOUT THE COUNTY TODAY (11/1/13).
SECTIONS OF FM-321 BETWEEN TENNESSEE COLONY AND NECHES WERE CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING
